rulings.Case Title: NICKLAUS ODA ET AL VS. RONALD G. TONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff Nicholas Moore
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 10, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF NICKLAUS ODA, DONNA LITTLE, HENRY FLYNN, NICHOLAS MOORE, SHAWN SMITH, YIGIT UCAR, JACLYN MCGLYNN Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff Nicholas Moore continued to March 27, 2020 for the moving party to submit supplemental briefing including case authority allowing the Court to dismiss a deceased Plaintiff's action under CCP 581(m) or any cases authorizing the Court to dismiss a deceased Plaintiff's case and the effect of such dismissal, if any, on potential successor's in interest claims brought after the dismissal. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TATIANA DINS VS. CARDENAS THREE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 10, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED. Defendant to prepare order and present it for execution at the hearing. Hearing required to address Amended Proof of Service filed on December 3, 2019. Blake Callan to be present. If paragraphs 3(b) and 6 of the Amended Proof of Service filed on December 3, 2019 was not filled out by Blake Callan, any individual(s) who filled out these paragraphs shall also be present. Further, counsel who authorized the filing of the Amended Proof of Service shall be present. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY ASSOCIATES, LP ET AL VS. MAXIMUS 620 OWNER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 10, 2019 line 9. PLAINTIFF MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY ASSOCIATES, LP, EJC FOLSOM LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication DENIED. Plaintiffs Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 437c. A triable issue of material fact remains relating to wavier and estoppel. Further, Plaintiffs Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Plaintiffs did not demonstrate that Defendants had a contractual duty to close escrow and consummate the purchase under the Purchase Agreement because Defendants assertions of waiver and estoppel create a triable issue of material fact pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 437c. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY TENANTS' ASSOCIATION ET AL VS. VALSTOCK MANAGEMENT COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Shao Yan Chen, Yuk Yee Cheng Motion To Compel Certain Defendants Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents Is Transferred To Department 301 To Be Heard At 9:00 A.M. On January 24, 2020.

Plaintiff Shao Yan Chen, Yuk Yee Cheng Motion To Compel Certain Defendants Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents continued to February 11, 2020 to be heard with other pending motions. The Court notes that there are multiple motions for summary judgment/adjudication improperly calendared for Department 302 for March 3, 5, and 6. This is a Real Property case and all law and motion matters shall be calendared in department 501. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion,Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Moiton To Vacate Defualt And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 10, 2019 line 11. DEFENDANT PATRICIA ENG Notice Of Motion,Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Moiton To Vacate Defualt And Judgment Hearing Required. By no later than 9:00 a.m. on February 10, 2020 Defendant to (1) file a proof of service and present a courtesy copy to department 501; and (2) provide a copy of a proposed answer including properly asserted affirmative defenses; proposed answer submitted with the motion is not drafted in accordance with the law, i.e. is devoid of any factual allegations. =(501/CFH)
